reason: The image depicts a clerk in what appears to be an office setting, writing with a quill. The clothing and objects present, such as the frock coat, top hat, quill pen, and wax-sealed documents, are consistent with the 1830s. The architecture and lighting are also appropriate for the period. The desk and inkwell also look accurate. The only minor detail which may detract from the authenticity is the candle holder.
